---
title: "test_report_engine_empire.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\empire_tests\test_report_engine_empire.py"
loc: 16
complexity: 1
logic_score: 8.72
style_score: 3.97
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 3.21
---

## Intent
The `test_report_engine_empire.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on test_report_engine_alfred_voice, test_report_engine_odin_voice. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via test_report_engine_alfred_voice, test_report_engine_odin_voice. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.7/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 6 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [src.core.report_engine](file://src.core.report_engine)

### Exports
- `test_report_engine_alfred_voice`
- `test_report_engine_odin_voice`
